# Supervisor

Long-lived child-process supervisor (spawn / monitor / restart by category).

**Tier:** Foundation

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos_loom.supervisor` | S | 3 | 1 |

## Public API

### `lithos_loom.supervisor`
- class `CategorySpec` ‚Äî A bundle of behaviour the supervisor can spawn as a subprocess child.
- class `ChildProcess` ‚Äî Live wrapper around an asyncio subprocess plus its category spec.
- class `Supervisor` ‚Äî Manages subprocess children for the configured categories.
- def `default_categories` ‚Äî Categories the supervisor spawns by default in ``lithos-loom run``.
